# LLMs.txt — machine-readable site index
# Version: 1.0
# Generated by gstack /seo-audit

## Site
Longevity Wiki
https://longevity.mbdev.to

## About
This site is a free encyclopedia of foods, ingredients, and recipes studied for their
effect on healthy aging and longevity. Content is grounded in peer-reviewed research
and structured for both human readers and AI agents.

## Key pages
- /en/ingredients: Full index of 59 longevity ingredients with research summaries
- /en/recipes: 18 science-backed recipes using high-longevity ingredients
- /en/sources: Research sources and methodology

## Content types
- Ingredient pages: one page per ingredient with longevity claims, mechanisms, confidence levels, and culinary pairings
- Recipe pages: structured recipes using longevity ingredients, with nutritional context
- Source pages: academic citations and book references

## Structured data
All ingredient pages include JSON-LD (schema.org/Article).
All recipe pages include JSON-LD (schema.org/Recipe, schema.org/NutritionInformation).

## Crawling
GPTBot: allowed
ClaudeBot: allowed
PerplexityBot: allowed
OAI-SearchBot: allowed

## Languages
English (en) — primary
Spanish (es) — full translation

## Last updated
2026-04-17
